title: Individual Counseling * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Individual Counseling * Chronic/Severe Mental Illness 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter AIDS/HIV Issues Chronic/Severe Mental Illness Hispanic/Latino Community Immigration Issues LGBTQ2+ Issues Native American Community Pregnant Individuals Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SHELTERCARE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers specialized, wraparound behavioral health services. Services are customized for each individual and often include counseling, skills training, case management, peer support, and support with community navigation. 499 W 4th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Adults with OHP or Medicaid coverage, a diagnosis of a serious mental illness, and difficulty managing activities of daily living Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 505-5188 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SHELTERCARE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES
